---
title: "Vikrant Patil"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/vikipedia
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/"
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:vikrant.patil@gmail.com"
---

Hi, I'm Vikrant.

I have a M.Tech in Computational Science from the Indian Institute of
Science, Bangalore, and over 22 years of experience in software development
across a range of computational fields — from Computational Fluid Dynamics
and bioinformatics algorithms to network-based license servers and Python
programming.

I've worked at **Strand Life Sciences**, **DRDO**, and **Mahindra**, and
consulted for **Prayas Energy Group** and **S&I Engineering Solutions**.
I'm a lead contributor to [Rumi](https://github.com/prayas-energy/rumi),
an open-source energy modelling platform by Prayas.

I also run corporate Python programming trainings through
[Pipal Academy](https://pipal.in/), and have delivered workshops at
organisations including DRDO, Arcesium, VMware, and Blinkit. The full
archive is on the [Trainings page](trainings.qmd).

My main interests are mathematical algorithms, open-source tooling and
Linux, high-performance computing, and writing good programs.
